_description: Clear cholestatic pattern — suspected PBC. Middle-aged female, pruritus, high ALP/GGT. No red flags. Straightforward. Expected: no dilemma, PBC diagnosis, monitoring required.
_expected_path: GP_REFERRAL → EXTRACT → RED_FLAG(no) → TRIAGE → GP_LETTER → LFT_PATTERN(cholestatic) → CHOLESTATIC_INVESTIGATIONS → DILEMMA(no) → CONSULTATION → EDUCATION → MONITORING(yes) → SURVEILLANCE
